GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [revenue@1 DESC]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[n_name], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]

          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_name@0], 8), input_partitions=8

--- memory ---
